notes: Dual-wields two Korven's Crimson Crescents. Icy Veins pairs this list with specific reforges per item — see their guide when fine-tuning. Capacitive Primal Diamond is the legendary meta. Drops listed are 25 Heroic; Normal/Flex versions are the same items at lower item level. Draft compiled from Icy Veins MoP Classic guides.
